title: Corr Skirata
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{MultipleIssues|citation|updatecontent=[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]}} {{Character |type=Mandalorian |image= |name=CT-5108/8843
Corr |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin= |cyber=[[Cybernetics/Legends|Prosthetic arms]] |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Omega Squad]] *[[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] **[[Clan Skirata]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Was it very painful?''"
"''I don't remember a thing, sir, but it hurt when I woke up in the bacta tank.|[[Ordo Skirata|Ordo]] and Corr, discussing Corr's injuries|''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]''}} '''Corr Skirata''', formally known as '''CT-5108/8843''' during his service in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Clone ordnance specialist/Legends|munitions disposal specialist]] who was assigned to a desk job on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|GAR]] logistics base after he was severely injured by an explosive. He lost both of his lower arms from just above the elbows down, and was waiting for more advanced [[Cybernetics/Legends|prosthetic replacements]] to become available. Due to his prosthetic limbs, he developed the habit of sharpening knives on his fingertips, and was known for his tricks with blades, many of which carried the risk of maiming a normal [[Human/Legends|Human]]. Corr assisted [[Kal Skirata]], [[Omega Squad]], [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]], and [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando|Null-class ARC troopers]] [[Mereel Skirata|Null-7]] and [[Ordo Skirata|Null-11]] to eliminate a [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] cell on Coruscant. During this assignment, he surprised Omega Squad with his non-discretion with a [[Z-6 rotary blaster cannon/Legends|Z-6 Rotary Blaster]]. Impressed by Corr's competence, Skirata decided to train him as a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] with the permission of [[Arligan Zey]]. Corr could have replaced [[Darman Skirata|Darman]] in Omega Squad in order for Darman to accompany [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] to [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]], but Darman declined the offer. While training to become a commando, he developed tastes similar to Mereel and would often explore the social scene of cities they visited. Also during his commando training, he worked briefly with [[Jaing Skirata]] and [[Kom'rk Skirata|Kom'rk]]. Later, he was officially designated as '''RC-5108/8843''' and assigned to Omega Squad to fill the role that [[Fi Skirata|RC-8015]] had vacated, due to a severe brain injury. He would later be adopted by Skirata, alongside the rest of Omega Squad, making him '''Corr Skirata'''. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] ended he was among the first to desert to [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] where they lived in [[Kyrimorut/Legends|Kyrimorut]]. He later developed a relationship with [[Jilka Zan Zentis]]. His [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|armor]] colors were red and green. ==Personality== Corr took over as comic relief for Omega Squad after Fi had left Omega Squad and went to Mandalore. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' *''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' *''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Corr Skirata |pl=RC-5108/8843 }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Skirata, Corr}} [[Category:Clan Skirata]] [[Category:Clone commandos]] [[Category:Cyborgs with prosthetics]] [[Category:Galactic Republic deserters]] [[Category:Individuals with lost limbs]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Sharpshooters and snipers]]
